A

addStudent(Student) - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Group
Adds a student to the group.
addTask(String) - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Assignment
Adds a task identifier to this assignment.
Assignment - Class in ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model
Represents the mapping of specific tasks to a student group.

Constructs an Assignment for a specific group.

B

Bonus - Class in ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model
Represents additional points awarded to a specific student for a specific task.

Constructs a Bonus record.

C

CheckPoint - Class in ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model
Represents a course milestone or deadline.

Constructs a CheckPoint with a name and a date string.

Root configuration object that stores all data parsed from the DSL.

Loader responsible for parsing and executing the Groovy DSL configuration.

G

getAssignments() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Config
Return list of task assignments.

Retrieves task IDs assigned to a specific group.

Return list of individual student bonuses.
getDate() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.CheckPoint
Return the deadline date.
getGitName() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Student
Return the student's Git username.
getGroup() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Group
Return the list of students belonging to this group.
getGroupNumber() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Assignment
Return the assigned group number.
getGroups() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Config
Return list of student groups.
getHardDeadline() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Task
Return the date of the hard deadline.
getId() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Task
Return the unique task ID.
getMaxPoints() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Task
Return the maximum points available.
getName() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.CheckPoint
Return the name of the checkpoint.
getName() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Student
Return the student's full name.
getNumber() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Group
Return the group number.
getPoints() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Bonus
Return the amount of bonus points.
getPoints() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Config
Return list of course checkpoints.
getRepoUrl() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Student
Return the URL to the student's repository.
getSoftDeadline() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Task
Return the date of the soft deadline.
getStudentGitName() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Bonus
Return the target student's Git username.
getTaskId() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Bonus
Return the related task ID.
getTaskIds() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Assignment
Return the list of assigned task identifiers.
getTasks() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Config
Return list of defined tasks.
getTitle() - Method in class ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model.Task
Return the task title.

Service for managing git operations like cloning and updating student repositories.

Constructs a GitService with a specified base directory.

Represents a student group containing a collection of students.

Student - Class in ru.nsu.g.a.vybortseva.model
Represents a student with their personal information and repository details.
